videoSnippet.title: Classical is King! || José Martínez vs Liem Le || Biel Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Lotus July Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/UbnjUeLN
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Martinez Alcantara, Jose Eduardo (2650) - Le, Quang Liem (2731)
Biel Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [06] 2026.07.14
C72 Ruy Lopez, modern Steinitz defence, 5.O-O

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 d6 5.O-O Bd7 6.c3 g5 7.d4 g4 8.Ne1 h5 9.f4 exd4 10.cxd4 d5 11.e5 Nh6 12.Nc3 Nf5 13.Nxd5 Rh6 14.Nc2 Ncxd4 15.Nxd4 Bc5 16.Be3 Nxe3 17.Nxe3 Bxa4 18.Qxa4+ b5 19.Qc2 Qxd4 20.Rae1 Qc4 21.Rf2 Qb4 22.Rff1 O-O-O 23.Kh1 Bxe3 24.Rxe3 Rd2 25.Qf5+ Kb7 26.Qxf7 Rc6 27.Rc3 Rxc3 28.bxc3 Qe4 29.Rg1 h4 30.Qh5 h3 31.Qxg4 hxg2+ 32.Rxg2 Rxa2 33.h4 Rf2 34.f5 Rf4 35.Qe2 Rxh4+ 36.Kg1 Qb1+
